description_long: This is a long, rectangular bench with a dark wooden plank seat supported by a sturdy metal frame. The seat is made from several wooden boards, showing natural grain and some visible knots, giving it a rustic yet modern appearance. The supporting structure consists of two wide, angled metal legs connected by a horizontal crossbar, providing stability and strength. The bench has no backrest or armrests, making it accessible from either side and suitable for communal or public seating. Its minimalist design and robust materials suggest it is intended for outdoor use, such as in parks, sidewalks, or urban plazas. The overall construction appears durable, weather-resistant, and capable of supporting multiple users at once.
description: A long, backless wooden bench with a dark plank seat and sturdy angled metal legs, designed for outdoor public use. The minimalist, robust construction features visible wood grain and a strong metal frame.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the bench, highlighting the dark wooden seat and the angled metal legs.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the narrow profile of the bench, emphasizing the thickness of the wooden seat and the width of the metal supports.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the wooden seat and the crossbar connecting the metal legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the narrow profile and the robust metal leg structure.
attribute_leg_design: two wide angled metal supports with a horizontal crossbar
